CONTENT.Career: On 30 June 2022, Jabrane was nominated for the 2022 CAF inter club player of the year awards.In the inaugural season of the African Football League, Jabrane scored the first goal for wydad in a 1–0 away victory against Enyimba, the team later defeated them 3–0 at home, thus qualifying them to the semi-final .On 1 November 2023, Jabrane was nominated for the 2023 African Footballer of the Year and 2023 Interclub Player of the Year by CAF.
CONTENT.Honours: Wydad ACBotola Pro (3) : 2018–19, 2020–21, 2021–22CAF Champions League: 2021-22; runner-up: 2018-19, 2022-23Moroccan Throne Cup runner-up: 2022–21African Football League runner-up: 2023MoroccoAfrican Nations Championship (2): 2018, 2020IndividualAfrican Nations Championship Team of the Tournament: 2020Botola Player of the Season: 2022Botola Midfielder of the Season: 2020–21Botola Team of the Season: 2020–21, 2021–22OrdersOrder of the Throne: 2022
CONTENT.International goals: Scores and results list Morocco's goal tally first.
CONTENT.International career: On 10 November 2022, he was named in Morocco's 26-man squad for the 2022 FIFA World Cup in Qatar.

SUMMARY: Yahya Jabrane (Arabic: يحيى جبران; born 18 June 1991) is a Moroccan professional footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder for Kuwait SC and the Morocco national team.
